title: Stage31-B Coverage/Entailment Probe Evaluation
interpretation: No model predictions were evaluated (dry-run mode). Run with --predictions-file to obtain a Coverage/Entailment diagnostic.

observed_stage31b_result.interpretation: The current proxy stack is conservative but under-structured. It can often suppress over-claims, but it cannot reliably preserve valid SUPPORT under weakening/generalization/part-inclusion entailment.

leakage_policy: This probe is diagnostic-only. Do not use for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or model selection.
next_step_recommendation: Run with --predictions-file to determine next steps. If predictions reveal systematic failure, proceed to Stage31-C.
